description:
About the job
Role: Kong API Developer with AWS

Location: [Sydney - Hybrid]



Responsibilities:
Develop and manage APIs using Kong API Gateway.
Configure plugins for security, logging, and rate limiting.
Integrate Kong with AWS services (EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS).
Ensure API security and performance.
Collaborate with teams and automate deployments.
Maintain API documentation.


Requirements:
Experience with Kong API Gateway and plugins.
Strong knowledge of AWS (EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS).
Familiar with API security best practices.
Scripting skills (Python, Bash).
Experience with CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes.
Excellent problem-solving skills.



Preferred:
AWS Certified Solutions Architect.
Experience with microservices and REST APIs.
